; Riddle-only launcher for reMarkable Paper Pro OS 3.27.
; This deliberately avoids AppLoad's full-screen launcher and touch-event layer.

AFFECT [[4911547370760691430]]
    IMPORT net.asivery.CommandExecutor [[180922.180921]]

    TRAVERSE [[3819512207256720568]]
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT {
            AsyncCommandExecutor {
                id: riddleCommand
                command: "/home/root/xovi/exthome/appload/riddle/appload-launch.sh"
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE

    TRAVERSE [[3819512207256720568]] > [[14125623155555875541]]#[[15885405667098360701]]
        LOCATE AFTER [[3819512207256720568]]#[[4073320026945606142]]
        INSERT {
            ~&16385778650434842232&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: openRiddle
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "openRiddle"
                ~&214642559243&~: "Riddle"
                ~&8399601734642709923&~: "file:///home/root/xovi/exthome/appload/riddle/icon.png"
                ~&7082453764421&~: ~&214625660372&~
                ~&233726547792244&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                    if (!riddleCommand.running) {
                        riddleCommand.startCommand(1000);
                    }
                }
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&17520348323745447649&~: ~&7082020628281&~.~&15061686673205541622&~
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&7797818826744279624&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~
                ~&11921478716705041271&~: ~&6504254477&~
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE

    TRAVERSE [[3819512207256720568]]#[[6504254477]]
        REBUILD [[15578034235503008618]]
            LOCATE AFTER STREAM \~&16045040163728568448&~\ INSERT STREAM \, openRiddle\
        END REBUILD
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
